records.title: NBC’s Best Chance to Boost Jimmy Fallon, Seth Meyers May Come During TV’s Slow Summer Cycle

content.summary: Jimmy Fallon and Seth Meyers on Monday evening start several weeks of late-night broadcasts aimed at reaching summer audiences, one of TV’s smallest pools of viewership. And yet, the two hosts have a giant opportunity ahead of them. Fallon will launch NBC’s “Tonight Show” on Monday without any regular competitors — a throwback to the […]

records.title: Renée Zellweger, Michael Keaton & Judi Dench Projects Make 2026 HollyShorts Lineup

content.summary: EXCLUSIVE: The lineup for the 2026 edition of HollyShorts features a host of big names in front of and behind the camera including Renée Zellweger, whose directorial debut They is in the lineup, alongside projects featuring Judi Dench, Michael Keaton, Martin Freeman, Alexandra Shipp, Vincent Cassel, Jordan Peele and Michael Caine. records.title: Sam Neill: A versatile actor whose roles went far beyond Jurassic Park

content.summary: The actor, who has died aged 78, built up a long string of screen credits over a five-decade career.
key_facts: 据bbc.co.uk页面，Sam Neill: A versatile actor whose roles went far beyond Jurassic Park。

records.title: Sam Neill’s final interview: ‘I’d like to think that, in life, I’m a goodie’

content.summary: The actor, who has died aged 78, recently answered Guardian readers’ questions about missing out on James Bond, the true terrors of Jurassic Park and why he called his prize cow Helena Bonham Carter Peter Bradshaw on Sam Neill A life in pictures ‘A true gentleman’: actors, directors and leaders pay tribute to Sam Neill Obituary Neill interviewed in 2023 , 2024 and 2026 Did you consult a canine expert about how best to regress into a dog in Dean Spanley? WomanofWolfville There was no consultation. I’ve studied dogs – wittingly or unwittingly – over the years, so the portrayal came from that. I’ve had dogs all my life. I understand them better than I do people. I had a Staffy for 15 years. They are the most expressive of dogs – every flicker of guilt or pleasure is written all over their faces. If I had to leave, my dog wouldn’t take it well. I’d pack in secret – if she saw a suitcase, she’d plunge into despair. When I returned, she’d walk right past me and shun me as punishment. I’d think: “Are you ever going to forgive me?” Continue reading...
key_facts: 据theguardian.com页面，Sam Neill’s final interview: ‘I’d like to think that, in life, I’m a goodie’。
